plate-tectonics.rationale: Two rights-cleared photographs provide field and specimen context: the Þingvellir rift landscape and a collected Loihi pillow-lava specimen. Exact self-generated diagrams carry the boundary geometry and magnetic-stripe reasoning.

tectonic-hazards.rationale: Two rights-cleared public-domain photographs provide direct observational context: surface rupture offsetting a road after the Ridgecrest earthquake and an eruption plume viewed from orbit. Three original accessible SVGs carry causal mechanisms that photographs cannot show alone.
